_comment: Microsoft Intune Custom Configuration for Cortex Code
1. Replace [Your Company] with your organization name
2. Create a Custom Configuration Profile in Intune
3. Deploy via Intune Scripts (shell/PowerShell) to write the config file
NOTE: Intune doesn't directly support arbitrary file deployment.
Use Intune Scripts (shell/PowerShell) to deploy the config file.
description: Organization security policy for Cortex Code CLI
